title: Velvet Ribbon Pink 5/8 Inch (15mm) 10 Yards Manjonzic Single-Sided Velvet Ribbon Trim Perfect for Christmas Trees Gift Wrapping Bouquets Wedding Decor
features: Luxurious Texture Made of soft velvet, this ribbon adds a touch of elegance to any project. Its pink color enhances aesthetics, making it perfect for creating sophisticated decorations and gifts

Versatile Use This ribbon is ideal for various applications, including Christmas trees, gift wrapping, bouquets, and wedding decor. Its versatility makes it a must-have for crafters and event planners

Generous Length: A roll with 10 yards of ribbon, you have plenty of material for multiple projects. Whether making bows, decorating gifts, or crafting unique floral arrangements, this ribbon provides the length you need for creativity
Easy to Work The single-sided design allows for effortless crafting, making it easy to tie bows and create stunning embellishments. It is perfect for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts

Seasonal Charm The pink hue complements holiday themes and year-round decor. It's an excellent choice for adding a festive touch to your home or special events, making every occasion feel more special
